title: AI Lady With Rock Breaking Glass Bridge
about:
AI Lady With Rock Breaking Glass Bridge refers to an AI-generated video of a heavyset white woman wearing a pink and red outfit holding a giant rock (or boulder) and jumping backward on a glass bridge to break it and make everyone on it fall into the river below. The clip continues by showing a golden retriever dog rescuing a little girl in the river and bringing her back to her mother. The video was originally posted on Facebook in late August 2025. It was reposted to Twitter / X soon after, in September 2025, where users likened it to Facebook AI Slop and used the post, and its engagement, as evidence of the Dead Internet Theory.

Memes and viral posts largely centered on the woman who broke the bridge with the rock. Users on X humorously pretended that she was a wanted criminal that U.S. President Donald Trump and FBI Director Kash Patel were wrongly being silent about. After the video went viral on X, internet users discovered that it was part of a larger genre of AI videos on Facebook about people breaking glass bridges with boulders.
origin:
On August 25th, 2025, the Facebook[1] page James Mason shared an AI-generated video as a Reel that showed a heavyset woman wearing a pink T-shirt, standing on a glass bridge and holding a boulder over her head. She then jumps backward and breaks the glass bridge, causing all of the people to fall into a river below. The video then focuses on a little girl who is saved by a dog and brought back to her mother. Over one month, the video received over 225,000 views and 800 likes.

The James Mason Facebook[2] page centers on an AI character, who is described as a photographer in the account's About section.[3] The About section also links to a website called school404.com,[4] which is an AI video content company owned by the company Magic Group.[4]

Magic Group's website URL, magicgroup.ai, is seen in a watermark over the original AI Lady With Rock Breaking Glass Bridge video. The account, and other Facebook[5] accounts following the same theme, appear to be admined by the company, headed by viral Instagram[6] magician Julius Dein.
